content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty modestly positive (+0.11%) with energy/metals leading and PSU banks weak (-1.30%). VIX easing slightly to 18.01 but still elevated. Book is 59% deployed with three working LIMIT orders pending — focus is position management, not new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down 4% but SL at 76.50 still intact (CMP 78.28). Q4 results were strong (+35% PAT, GNPA 1.45%). PSU bank index weak today but thesis (post-results momentum, near 52w high) remains valid. Don't loosen SL; let it work. No-op MODIFY would be wasted."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.98,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Best performer (+6.3%). SL is already above breakeven at 1029.98 (locks ~4.7% gain). Target 1110 still ~6% upside. Per the no-op rule, current SL/target are appropriate — emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Gold under near-term pressure but acts as portfolio hedge. -1% within tolerance, SL at 119 well below CMP 123.82. Hold for FOMC catalyst this week."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1413.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "SL already at entry (1413 = entry 1412.94). No-op MODIFY — emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Down 2.1%, SL at 2295 still ~1.5% away. Q4 results April 30 is binary catalyst — let the SL define risk into the print. Nestle's strong print sets read-through."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 406 (above entry 404.50). +1.6% unrealized — not yet at +2% threshold for further trail. No-op MODIFY — emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Down 1.4%, SL at 1770 (CMP 1785.50). Stock at 52w high after 39% monthly rally — overbought risk. Let SL work; don't tighten further given high ATR."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Near flat (-0.2%). Organon acquisition catalyst in play. SL at 1720 ~0.6% below CMP — adequate. Q4 results May 19 ahead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Essentially flat, SL at 318 ~0.7% below CMP. Defensive utility play with heatwave demand tailwind. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 76.50 intact; thesis (Q4 beat, near 52w high) unchanged."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to 1029.98 (above entry). +6.3% gain locked. Let it run to 1110."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position. SL 119 wide enough to absorb gold volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven (1413). Wait for further move before trailing."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results April 30 binary event. SL 2295 defines pre-event risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 406 (above entry). At +1.6%, below +2% trail threshold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Power cluster name in pullback after 39% rally. SL 1770 must hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Organon catalyst intact. SL 1720 tight risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position. Tight SL at 318."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "AUBANK, IDFCFIRSTB, MANAPPURAM gapped 10% on Q4 results — chasing post-gap is risky; would consider only on a sustained pullback to gap-fill levels. PAYTM volume surge ahead of May 6 results is interesting but binary; pass for now. INDIACEM 17.7x volume on a down move is distribution — avoid. COALINDIA, MARUTI, TATACONSUM data not provided in this batch. KAYNES setup unclear without more context. Cluster discipline: already heavy in power (NTPC, POWERGRID, TORNTPOWER) and have pending TATAPOWER + PHARMABEES + HINDZINC LIMITs — adding nothing new today.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 59% deployed with 3 pending LIMIT orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) that will lift deployment further if they fill. Per deployment hysteresis, default disposition is NO new entries today. Power cluster is already at risk of concentration (NTPC + POWERGRID + TORNTPOWER + pending TATAPOWER would be ~25%+ on a single macro driver). Pending HINDZINC LIMIT at 612 is far below CMP — likely won't fill, reasonable to let it sit. Pending PHARMABEES at 23.65 also below market — leave. Pending TATAPOWER at 443 — leave; if it fills, power cluster will be at saturation and I'll need to trim. Current trailing SL hygiene: PNBHOUSING and NTPC SLs are already above entry, NESTLEIND at breakeven — good discipline."
}
